page_metadata.biotools__summary: ISTDECO (In Situ Transcriptomics Decoding by Deconvolution) is a simple tool for deconvolving combinatorial image data generated by FISH techniques into series of non-combinatorial images.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ISTDECO (In Situ Transcriptomics Decoding by Deconvolution) is a simple tool for deconvolving combinatorial image data generated by FISH techniques into series of non-combinatorial images.
